35a + 15(1,650 – a) = 47,150  
35a + 24,750 – 15a = 47,150  
20a = 47,150 – 24,750  
20a = 22,400  
a = 22,400 / 20 = 1,120  

Then  
c = 1,650 – 1,120 = 530  

Adult tickets sold: 1,120
